name: PLNHRKTUP
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[PLNHRKTUP] ON [dbo].[PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI]
FOR INSERT,DELETE,UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
DECLARE @PB_TURU AS INT
DECLARE @PB_REF AS INT

DECLARE @SD_REF AS INT
DECLARE @TD_REF AS INT

DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select DISTINCT PB_REF from DELETED
OPEN Dcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
INTO @PB_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	
	IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK)  WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF  AND CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),MIKTAR)-CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR)>0 AND STATUS=0)>0 
		UPDATE PLANLAMAFISLERI SET STATUS=0 WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF AND STATUS=1 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0
	ELSE 
		UPDATE PLANLAMAFISLERI SET STATUS=1 WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF AND STATUS=0 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0

	IF (select COUNT(*) from INSERTED)=0
	BEGIN
		DECLARE Dcur_SP CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
		select DISTINCT SD_REF from DELETED WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF
		OPEN Dcur_SP;  
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur_SP 
		INTO @SD_REF;
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
		BEGIN  
			IF ISNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI PH WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN PLANLAMAFISLERI PF  WITH(NOLOCK) ON PF.PB_REF=PH.PB_REF AND PF.STATUS=0
						WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF),0)=0 
			BEGIN	
				UPDATE SIPARISHAREKETLERI SET PD=0,PB_REF=0 WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF
			END
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur_SP
		INTO @SD_REF;
		END  
		CLOSE Dcur_SP;  
		DEALLOCATE Dcur_SP;

        DECLARE Dcur_TP CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
		select DISTINCT TD_REF from DELETED WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF
		OPEN Dcur_TP;  
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur_TP 
		INTO @TD_REF;
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
		BEGIN  
			IF ISNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI PH WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN PLANLAMAFISLERI PF  WITH(NOLOCK) ON PF.PB_REF=PH.PB_REF AND PF.STATUS=0
						WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF),0)=0 
			BEGIN	
				UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET PD=0,PB_REF=0 WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF
			END
		FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur_TP
		INTO @TD_REF;
		END  
		CLOSE Dcur_TP;  
		DEALLOCATE Dcur_TP;

	END

FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
INTO @PB_REF;
END  
CLOSE Dcur;  
DEALLOCATE Dcur;


DECLARE Icur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select DISTINCT PB_TURU,PB_REF from INSERTED
OPEN Icur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM Icur 
INTO @PB_TURU,@PB_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	
	IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK)  WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF  AND CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),MIKTAR)-CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR)>0 AND STATUS=0)>0 
		UPDATE PLANLAMAFISLERI SET STATUS=0 WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF AND STATUS=1 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0
	ELSE 
		UPDATE PLANLAMAFISLERI SET STATUS=1 WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF AND STATUS=0 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0

IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF AND CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR)>CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),MIKTAR) AND STATUS=0)>0 
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @ASYUZ AS INT SET @ASYUZ=-1

	IF @PB_TURU=1 SET @ASYUZ=ISNULL((SELECT SATINALMAPLANLAMA_ASIM_YUZDESI FROM GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK) ),0)
	IF @PB_TURU=2 SET @ASYUZ=ISNULL((SELECT SATISPLANLAMA_ASIM_YUZDESI     FROM GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK) ),0)
	IF @PB_TURU=6 SET @ASYUZ=ISNULL((SELECT AMBARTALEP_ASIM_YUZDESI FROM GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK) ),0)
	IF @PB_TURU=5 SET @ASYUZ=0

	IF @ASYUZ=0 
		BEGIN rollback transaction RAISERROR ('Planning amount exceeded.' , 16, 1) END
END

FETCH NEXT FROM Icur
INTO @PB_TURU,@PB_REF;
END  
CLOSE Icur;  
DEALLOCATE Icur;
